summary: Frontend testing for JG12 features: ProfilePage body data form, ClientDashboard circular trackers, NutritionPage modals. Most features working correctly. Critical issue: /api/calculator/distribute endpoint missing (404) breaks NutritionPage macro distribution.

critical.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - not migrated from server_old.py to routes/calculator.py. NutritionPage depends on this endpoint to show macro targets per meal.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot display meal macro targets because /api/calculator/distribute returns 404. Progress bars show 0/0g.

passed_tests: ✅ ClientDashboard loads with circular SVG trackers
✅ ClientDashboard shows correct kcal: Entreno 1980, Descanso 2120
✅ ClientDashboard shows correct macros: Entreno P=190 H=170 G=60, Peri P=45, Descanso P=225 H=170 G=60
✅ ClientDashboard shows 'AUTO' badge for auto-calculated macros
✅ ClientDashboard quick action cards navigate correctly (Nutrición, Asistente IA, Reportes, Chat)
✅ ProfilePage body data inputs work (peso=80, %graso=20, sexo=H, objetivo=VOL)
✅ ProfilePage 'Calcular mis macros' button calls /api/calculator/targets/apply successfully
✅ ProfilePage shows macros result with 3 cards: Día Entreno, Perientreno, Día Descanso
✅ ProfilePage switching objetivo (volumen/definición) recalculates macros correctly
✅ NutritionPage loads with meal cards (C1, Intra, Post, C2, C3, C4)
✅ NutritionPage 'Lo hago yo' and 'SUGIÉREME UN MENÚ' buttons visible
✅ Mobile dashboard shows circular trackers correctly
action_items: CRITICAL: Add /api/calculator/distribute endpoint to routes/calculator.py - copy from server_old.py (uses dist_macros function)
The distribute endpoint reads macros from profile and distributes them across meals based on tipo_dia, num_comidas, momento_entreno, opcion_peri
critical_code_review_comments: routes/calculator.py: Missing /distribute endpoint that NutritionPage depends on
NutritionPage.jsx: Correctly imports RepeatMealModal and CopyDietModal components
ClientDashboard.jsx: CircularTracker SVG component well implemented with proper animations
ProfilePage.jsx: Body data form correctly calls /api/calculator/targets/apply

success_rate.backend: N/A (skipped per request, but found missing endpoint)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (18/20 tests pass, 2 blocked by missing distribute endpoint)

context_for_next_testing_agent: ProfilePage body data form and ClientDashboard circular trackers work correctly. NutritionPage loads but macro distribution is broken due to missing /api/calculator/distribute endpoint. RepeatMealModal and CopyDietModal components extracted correctly and working. The distribute endpoint exists in server_old.py but was not migrated to routes/calculator.py.
